artifacts.name: database-schema
artifacts.description: PostgreSQL schema (Alembic migrations). Authoritative source for table definitions, columns, indexes, constraints, foreign keys, and JSONB/ARRAY column shapes.

artifacts.name: deployment-architecture
artifacts.description: Production deployment topology — systemd service (notifier on :9000), port assignments, env file layout (/etc/notifier/.env vs repo .env), co-location with watcher service, and lifecycle commands.

artifacts.name: operational-runbook
artifacts.description: Operational command reference — uv/pytest/ruff/alembic invocations, dev server vs systemd workflow, env loading, and database migration procedures.

artifacts.name: systemd-unit
artifacts.description: systemd unit file for the notifier service — User, ExecStart command, EnvironmentFile sources, restart policy. Authoritative for production runtime config.
